title: Application Cache Causing Disk Bloat
symptoms: Disk usage spikes unexpectedly. Applications slow down due to excessive cached files.
root_cause_analysis: Application cache directories (e.g., browser or IDE caches) accumulate large files over time.
resolution_steps: Clear cache using built-in app settings or manually delete.

title: Slow Performance Due to Temp File Accumulation
symptoms: System boot and app launch times degrade.
root_cause_analysis: Temporary files in /tmp or C:\Windows\Temp accumulate without cleanup.
resolution_steps: Configure applications to auto-purge temp files.

title: Browser Cache Corruption
symptoms: Websites fail to load correctly or show outdated content.
root_cause_analysis: Corrupted browser cache entries prevent proper rendering.
resolution_steps: Restart browser and verify site rendering.

title: Package Manager Cache Overflow
symptoms: Linux package updates fail due to insufficient disk space.
root_cause_analysis: APT/YUM cache directories store outdated packages consuming space.

title: System Restore Points Consuming Space
symptoms: Low disk space warnings on Windows servers.
root_cause_analysis: Excessive restore points stored in System Volume Information.
resolution_steps: Limit maximum disk usage for restore points.

title: Log File Cache Overflow
symptoms: Applications crash due to full disk.
root_cause_analysis: Unrotated logs in /var/log or C:\Logs consume space.
resolution_steps: Implement logrotate or Windows Event Log archiving.

title: DNS Cache Stale Entries
root_cause_analysis: Local DNS resolver cache contains outdated records.

title: GPU Driver Cache Corruption
symptoms: Graphical applications fail to launch or crash.
root_cause_analysis: Corrupted shader cache files in GPU driver directories.

title: Build System Cache Overflow
symptoms: CI/CD pipelines fail due to disk exhaustion.
root_cause_analysis: Build tools (npm, pip, Maven) cache dependencies indefinitely.
resolution_steps: Run 'npm cache clean --force' or 'pip cache purge'.
Configure CI/CD to clear caches post-build.

title: Swap File Fragmentation
symptoms: System slows down under heavy load.
root_cause_analysis: Swap file fragmented across disk, reducing performance.
resolution_steps: Allocate swap on dedicated fast storage.
Monitor swap usage with 'vmstat' or Resource Monitor.
